Class Enemy

java.lang.Object
game.entity.Enemy
Direct Known Subclasses:
EasyEnemy, HardEnemy, MediumEnemy
public abstract class Enemy extends Object
Base class for all enemies. Movement logic lives here (it only needs map/collision context passed in), keeping GameController responsible only for orchestration and rendering.

  • Constructor Details

    • Enemy

      public Enemy(int size, int posX, int posY, Element element, boolean shielded)

  • Method Details

    • move

      public abstract void move(Tile[][] map, Seaweed[][] seaweeds, List<Enemy> enemies, int playerRow, int playerCol, int rows, int cols)
      Move this enemy one step. Subclasses override to choose a movement strategy.
      Parameters:
      map - tile grid
      seaweeds - seaweed grid //* @param hasBomb bomb grid
      enemies - all enemies (for collision avoidance)
      playerRow - player's current row (used by HARD follow-AI)
      playerCol - player's current col (used by HARD follow-AI)
      rows - grid height
      cols - grid width

    • moveRandom

      protected void moveRandom(Tile[][] map, Seaweed[][] seaweeds, List<Enemy> enemies, int rows, int cols)
      Continue in the current direction; turn on obstacle; reverse as last resort.

    • moveFollowPlayer

      protected void moveFollowPlayer(Tile[][] map, Seaweed[][] seaweeds, List<Enemy> enemies, int playerRow, int playerCol, int rows, int cols)
      Move toward the player using Manhattan-distance greedy search. Direction order is shuffled to break ties randomly.

    • canWalk

      public boolean canWalk(int r, int c, Tile[][] map, Seaweed[][] seaweeds, List<Enemy> enemies, int rows, int cols)
      Whether this enemy (1×1) can step onto (r,c).

    • canWalkHard

      public boolean canWalkHard(int nr, int nc, Tile[][] map, Seaweed[][] seaweeds, List<Enemy> enemies, int rows, int cols)
      Whether a 2×2 Hard enemy can anchor at top-left (nr, nc).

    • occupiesTile

      public boolean occupiesTile(int r, int c)
      True if this enemy occupies tile (r, c). Hard enemies occupy a 2×2 area; all others occupy exactly one tile.

    • isInBlastZone

      public boolean isInBlastZone(boolean[][] zone, int rows, int cols)
      True if this enemy is touched by the blast zone.
